content: The Self-Refine iterative self-improvement framework can serve as a modular backbone to unify fragmented multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, turning inconsistent reflective perspectives into sequential iterative refinement signals rather than parallel contrasting outputs. This integration creates a self-supervised reflective loop that inherits Self-Refine's advantage of requiring no extra training or supervision while addressing the core limitation of current multi-perspective reflection: how to productively leverage inconsistent self-evaluations.
